song_name: Taylor Swift - Now That We Dont Talk - Down Bad
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]

[Verse 1 ]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
 You went to a party[/tab]
I heard from everybody
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
 You part the crowd like the Red Sea, don't even get me started[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
 Did you get anxious though[/tab]
On the way home?
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
 I guess I'll never, ever know[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch]
Now that we don't talk[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
 You grew your hair long[/tab]
You got new icons
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
 And from the outside[/tab]
It looks like you're trying lives on
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
 I miss the old ways[/tab]

You didn't have to change

[Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Now I'm down bad crying at the gym[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]
Everything comes out teenage petulence[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Fuck it if I can't have him[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
I might just die, it would make no difference[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Down bad breaking up in blood[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]
Staring at the sky come back and pick me up[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Fuck it if I can't have us[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]
I might just not get up, I might stay[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]
Down bad[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]
Fuck it if I can't have him[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]
Down bad[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Fuck it if I can't have him[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
 What do you tell your friends we[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
 Shared dinner, long weekends with[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
 Truth is, I can't pretend it's[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
 Platonic, it just ended, so[/tab]

[Chorus 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Now I'm down bad crying at the gym[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]
Everything comes out teenage petulence[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Fuck it if I can't have him[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
I might just die, it would make no difference[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Down bad breaking up in blood[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]
Staring at the sky come back and pick me up[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Fuck it if I can't have us[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]
I might just not get up, I might stay[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]
Down bad (like I lost my twin)[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]
Fuck it if I can't have him (I'm down bad)[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]
Down bad (waving at the ship)[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Fuck it if I can't have him[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]D/F#[/ch]
 I loved you, hostile takeovers[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Am[/ch]
Encounters closer and closer[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]C[/ch]
All your indecent exposure[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]G[/ch]
How dare you say that it's...[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]D/F#[/ch]
I'll build you a fort on some planet[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]Am[/ch]
Where they can all understand it[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]C[/ch]
How dare you think it's romantic[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]G[/ch]
Leaving me safe and stranded[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D/F#[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]
Cause fuck it I was in love[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]
So fuck you if I can't have us[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Cause fuck it I was in love[/tab]

[Chorus 3]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                               [ch]C[/ch]
 I called my mom she said to get it off my chest[/tab]
[tab]                                           [ch]G[/ch]
Remind myself the way you faded til I left[/tab]
[tab]                                                       [ch]D/F#[/ch]
I cannot be your friend, so I pay the price of what I lost[/tab]
And what it cost
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]
Now that we don't talk[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]
I don't have to pretend I like acid rock[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
 Or that I'd like to be on a mega yacht[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
 With important men who think important thoughts[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                              [ch]Am[/ch]
 Guess maybe I am better off now that we don't talk[/tab]
And the only way back to my dignity
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
 Was to turn into a shrouded mystery[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
 Just like I had been when you were chasing me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]                                                 [ch]G[/ch]
 Guess this is what it was to be now that we don't talk[/tab]
